news.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX prices shares at $135, raising $75 billion in largest-ever IPO
Man who spent 1,500 BTC on graphics card now helps insure bitcoin holders
news.summary: Bitsurance, insures clients' bitcoin against "physical attacks" like fire, water, robbery and the "$5 Wrench Attack."

news.title: Americans secretly drove as much as $34 billion in offshore prediction market bets, new report claims
news.summary: A new report from a boutique consulting firm claims that nearly a third of U.S. prediction market volume occurs on offshore platforms.

news.title: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
news.summary: Coinbase's quantum advisory council says crypto developers should begin post-quantum migration work now, warning that unresolved questions around abandoned and vulnerable coins could become one of Bitcoin's biggest battles.

news.title: Ripple CEO Takes Aim at JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon Over Clarity Act Crypto Bill Criticism
news.summary: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse spoke out against JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon and his comments on the key piece of crypto legislation.

news.title: Microsoft President Asks Graduates to Stop Fearing AI and Start Adapting
news.summary: Brad Smith published a 3,000-word essay urging empathy for graduates booing AI at commencements. The same week, Microsoft's CFO confirmed headcount will keep shrinking.

news.title: Nasdaq-Listed Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Sells BTC, Cuts Debt and Authorizes Share Buyback
news.summary: Nakamoto, the Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin services and treasury firm, sold about $48 million worth of BTC and derivatives to help reduce debt.

news.title: 伊朗锡里克地区海岸附近传出爆炸声
news.summary:
【伊朗锡里克地区海岸附近传出爆炸声】金色财经报道，6月12日，据伊朗媒体12日报道，伊朗锡里克地区海岸附近多次传出爆炸声，原因不明。 (新华社)

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2397751

news.title: SpaceX持股方Ark称轨道数据中心或带来3,000亿美元年营收
news.summary:
【SpaceX持股方Ark称轨道数据中心或带来3,000亿美元年营收】金色财经报道，6月12日，Ark Investment Management的Brett Winton表示，按当前租赁费率计算，到本十年末，SpaceX通过部署数十吉瓦的轨道数据中心容量，可能产生3,000亿美元年营收。Ark首席未来学家Winton周四在SpaceX创纪录的首次公开募股(IPO)定价之前作出上述评估，详细解释了他眼中这家公司背后的估算逻辑。SpaceX目前是Ark旗下风投基金的最大持仓。SpaceX的机遇包括新型助推火箭以及利润丰厚的星链卫星互联网业务。

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2397750

news.title: 伊朗外交部：尚未就伊美协议达成最终结论
news.summary:
【伊朗外交部：尚未就伊美协议达成最终结论】金色财经报道，6月12日，伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃当地时间11日表示，关于美伊协议提出的事项都是猜测。到目前为止，伊朗尚未就协议达成最终结论。巴加埃还称，由于美国的行动，霍尔木兹海峡的局势更加不安全。巴加埃还表示，卡塔尔和巴基斯坦正积极发挥调解作用，但美国的行动影响了外交进程。他称，伊朗方面从一开始就清楚谈判的进展状况，协议文本的大部分内容已经完成，但美国方面不断改变其立场。伊朗已证明，对于其划定为“红线”的问题，伊方绝不会作出妥协。（央视）

原文链接: https://flash.jin10.com/detail/20260612045546518800
